title: for loop with multiple variables in initialization loop fails to compile
body:
---


Author Name: **Krzysztof Jankowski**
Original Redmine Issue: 814 from https://www.veripool.org
Original Date: 2014-08-29


---

Hi,
please see below an example SV code which fails to compile in Verilator:

@
`define FAIL 1

module forloop(
  input  clock,
  input  logic [1:0] [1:0] datai,
  output logic [1:0] [1:0] datao
);
logic [1:0] [1:0] datat;

always_comb
begin
`ifdef FAIL
	for (integer i=0, k=0; i<4; i=i+1, k=k+1)
	begin
		datat[i][k] = 0;
	end
`else
	integer k=0;
	for (integer i=0; i<4; i=i+1)
	begin
		datat[i][k] = 0;
		k=k+1;
	end
`endif
end

always_ff @(posedge clock)
begin
  if (clock)
     datao <= datat;
end
endmodule
@
